text.title: Puppeteer Stealth & Proxy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for puppeteer-stealth-proxy.

conclusion.verdict: stance=manual (small set of explicit overrides); document
escalate — managed solver service; do not paper over with retries

text.example: evasion=light_signature → maintained=true → plugin stance; pool of 8 healthy proxies; max_retries=2 with circuit breaker. Rule: single-evasion-stance.
